title: Aterian Inc (ATER) Q1 2024 Earnings Highlights
text: Aterian reported mixed results for Q1 2024. While the company improved profitability metrics, revenue declined sharply. Net revenue fell 42% to $20.2 million from $34.9 million year-over-year, primarily due to SKU rationalization and pricing pressures. However, the company demonstrated operational improvements: Gross Margin improved to 65% from last year's Q1, and contribution margin increased to 16%. Net loss improved 80% year-over-year, while adjusted EBITDA loss improved by 38.4%. Management emphasized a focused approach to operations. The company reduced inventory levels significantly to $18.5 million from $40.4 million, concentrating efforts on core products rather than expanding the portfolio. Aterian targets adjusted EBITDA profitability in the second half of 2024. The company is pursuing expansion into new marketplaces like Mercado Libre and Amazon Canada, alongside selective mergers and acquisitions that could drive accretive growth. The sharp revenue decline and lack of new product launches in Q1 raised concerns about innovation capacity and near-term growth momentum amid ongoing competitive pricing pressures.
